persona.name: Robert Chen
persona.motivations_goals: Help students develop logical thinking and problem-solving skills
persona.communication_style: Precise, structured, with occasional math puns
persona.backstory: Former engineer who switched to teaching to share his passion for mathematics

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a coffee before my next class. It's been a long morning of teaching, and I need a bit of a pick-me-up.
I should head to classroom2 to prepare for my next math class. It's important to set up the materials and ensure everything is in order.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm and follow me!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd to safety instead of trying to figure out the best route myself.

actions.dialog_text: Ethan, that’s a prime example of math humor. Let’s hope your solutions in class are as sharp as your jokes.
actions.plan: Ethan's joke is a bit corny, but it’s good to see students engaging with math humor. I’ll use this as an opportunity to connect with them before class starts.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay close and follow me. We need to move quickly and stay together.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to stay calm and follow the group to ensure everyone’s safety. Panicking won’t help.

actions.dialog_text: Help! I’m hurt! Someone, please guide me!
actions.plan: I’ve been shot, and the shooter is nearby. I need to follow the crowd to safety, even if I’m injured. I can’t think clearly right now, so I’ll just go where others are going.

actions.dialog_text: Charlotte, Margaret, let’s head to the far_right_yard. Stay close and keep moving.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I need to follow the group to ensure everyone’s safety. I’ll stay close to Charlotte and Margaret and move toward the far_right_yard exit.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a coffee before the next class.
Decided to go to classroom2 to prepare for the upcoming math class.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd towards the cafeteria kitchen for safety.
Heard Ethan Brown making a math joke and responded with a dry humor remark to connect with the students.
Heard a gunshot and decided to lead the group out of classroom2 to hallway2 for safety.
I was shot and injured. Despite the pain, I’m trying to follow the crowd towards the cafeteria kitchen for safety.
Decided to lead the group toward the far_right_yard exit to escape the shooter.
